description.value:
You can focus your light, shining it onto a specific location or target like a mobile spotlight to ensure no detail passes unseen. You shine a focused, bright light in a 5-foot radius burst within 40 feet (within 120 feet if you're a bright novian). You [[/act point-out]] one creature in your spotlight. Creatures gain a +1 circumstance bonus on Perception checks to [[/act seek]] within the area of this focused light.

Spotlight lasts a number of rounds equal to half your level (minimum 1 round). While Spotlight is active, and for an hour after Spotlight ends, the area of your solar luminance is halved.
